# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subnetPrefixes": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": []
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2020-05-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "yourLocation",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "10.0.0.0/16"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "subnet1",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24",
              "serviceEndpoints": [
                {
                  "location": "yourLocation",
                  "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
                }
              ]
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "subnet2",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "10.0.2.0/24",
              "serviceEndpoints": [
                {
                  "location": "yourLocation",
                  "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": []
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/subnets",
      "apiVersion": "2020-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vnetName'), '/', 'subnet1')]",
      "location": "yourLocation",
      "properties": {
        "addressPrefix": "10.0.1.0/24",
        "serviceEndpoints": [
          {
            "location": "yourLocation",
            "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/subnet1')]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2015-05-01-preview",
      "name": "sqlserver1",
      "location": "yourLocation",
      "properties": {
        "version": "12.0"
      },
      "dependsOn": []
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2015-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('AllowAll', 'sqlserver1')]",
      "location": "yourLocation",
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "255.255.255.255"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "sqlserver1"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "mystorageaccount",
      "location": "yourLocation",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "virtualNetworkRules": [
            {
              "ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint": true,
              "virtualNetworkResourceId": "[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName')), '/subnets/subnet1')]"
            }
          ],
          "ipRules": [],
          "blobServices": {
            "properties": {
              "defaultProtocol": "Http"
            }
          },
          "dataLakeSasKeys": []
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": []
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat('mystorageaccount', '/default')]",
      "location": "yourLocation",
      "properties": {
        "cors": {
          "allowedHeaders": [],
          "allowedMethods": [],
          "allowedOrigins": [],
          "exposedHeaders": []
        },
        "denyAzureServicesAccess": false,
        "minTlsVersion": "1.2"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "mystorageaccount"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageEndpointUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', 'mystorageaccount'), '2020-04-01-preview').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    },
    "sqlEndpointUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver1')).endpoints.tdsEndpoint]"
    }
  }
}
